_comment: Readiness fields for Maria, derived from data/patients/maria/notes/ (timeline 2026-07-10 -> 07-12; demo clock 2026-07-12T15:00). In the full pipeline these are LLM-extracted with quotes; seeded here so the readiness gate runs deterministically.

medical_clearance.evidence: medically cleared in ED post-ingestion (day0 ED course)

vitals.evidence: overnight vitals per day1 RN note ('awake for vitals at 0400')

risk_assessment.evidence: risk assessed at initial eval; day2 transcript screens SI only — intent/plan NOT formally reassessed

hold_paperwork.evidence: 5150 documented; day1 RN: 'Continues on 1:1 observation per hold status'

no_violence_risk.evidence: no agitation after admission night; no violence documented this admission

ambulatory.evidence: independent on unit per day1 RN note
